response.original_title: Get Dialed In - Snowboard Instructional Video
response.overview: Released in 1993 by Diana Video Productions, Get Dialed In is a classic 45-minute snowboarding tutorial that guides riders through step-by-step beginner and intermediate exercises. The VHS features world champions and professional instructors, blending fundamental riding techniques with action footage, equipment advice, and mental preparation.
response.title: Get Dialed In - Snowboard Instructional Video
